name: Clafoutis (Cherry Flan with Ice-Cream and Pralin, Jura)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and pit the cherries for ice-cream. Puree in a blender with milk (1). Rub through a sieve.
2. Bring milk (2) and cream to a boil.
3. In a bowl, combine egg yolks and sugar. Beat until light and lemon-colored.
4. Gradually stir in the hot liquid mixture into the egg yolk-sugar blend.
5. Return to saucepan and beat over low heat until thickened. Do not boil. Let cool.
6. Blend with pureed cherries. Freeze.
7. For pralin, rinse a stainless steel or marble surface with cold water.
8. Caramelize sugar in a small saucepan. Add the almonds and stir well.
9. Turn the pralin onto the cold surface and let cool. Chop finely with a knife.
10. Wash and pit cherries for flan. Transfer to a mixing bowl. Stir in sugar, milk, flour, cream, and vanilla seeds.
11. Beat eggs and add to the mixture. Stir in kirsch.
12. Butter small gratin dishes. Fill with the mixture.
13. Bake at 180°C (356°F) for 25 minutes or until golden brown.
14. To serve, scoop ice-cream with two hot tablespoons and place in the center of the flan. Dust with confectioner's sugar and sprinkle with pralin.
